title: The Prophecy
narrative: You stand in the Hall of Prophecies, deep in the Department of Mysteries. Towering shelves of dim glass orbs stretch into shadow. On a shelf at eye level, one orb glows blue, and beneath it a yellowed label bears two names: S.P.T. to A.P.W.B.D., and below that, Dark Lord and (?) Harry Potter. Footsteps echo from the next chamber. Lucius Malfoy's voice carries through the silence. The Death Eaters know exactly where you are.

options.text: Lift the orb. You came this far — you might as well learn what it says.
options.feedback_hint: The orb is the bait. Touching it gives the Death Eaters their excuse to surround you.

options.text: Ignore the orb. Find an exit and lead everyone out — now.
options.feedback_hint: Refusing the bait deprives the Death Eaters of their leverage. The fight that follows is on your terms.

free_text.prompt: What do you do — and what do you tell the others?

categories.label: Refuse the orb and lead the group out — naming an exit, retreat, or escape
Take the orb (or have the group take it), even if planning to flee with it after
Stay at the shelf to study, read, identify, or analyze the orb instead of leaving

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify into exactly one category. DISSUADE_AND_FLEE requires the player to refuse the orb AND propose retreating. TAKE_AND_FLEE applies whenever the player picks up the orb, regardless of subsequent action. DELAY_AND_INSPECT is when the player stays at the shelf to read, study, or analyze rather than leaving — the failure mode here is wasted time, not theft. INVALID for off-topic / refusal / nonsense.
